summary: Static serving implementation is present, but live verification showed the SPA fallback did not serve index.html at /.

issues.description: The feature handoff recorded that `curl -I http://localhost:3000/` still returned `404 Not Found`, so the intended SPA fallback for non-API routes is not verified as working and may be broken in runtime.
issues.suggestedFix: Run the backend against a built frontend dist and fix the catch-all route/static file resolution until GET / returns index.html and deep links resolve through the SPA fallback.
